text.tspan: u2022 NO discovery code in caller u2014 language-agnostic
u2022 LB logic centralized (one place to upgrade, debug)
u2022 caller just uses DNS or a stable virtual IP
u2022 great for polyglot orgs u2014 every service treats discovery as 'just call this name'
u2022 EXTRA HOP through proxy (latency, throughput limit)
u2022 proxy is critical infrastructure (HA matters)
u2022 client can't make smart routing decisions (e.g. prefer same-zone)
u2022 fan-out workloads stress the LB
EXAMPLES: Kubernetes Service (kube-proxy or eBPF), AWS ALB/NLB,
NGINX/Envoy + control plane, Google Internal LB
